programme.title: The Earthshot Prize Innovation Summit 2024
programme.desc: Founded by His Royal Highness, Prince William, The Earthshot Prize is a global competition designed to incentivize change and help to repair our planet by awarding five winners each year for their contributions to environmentalism. This year's Innovation Summit featured finalists selected by the Earthshot council in addition to panelists ranging from heads of state, grassroots organizations and tech leaders. This special Bloomberg program highlights the event's biggest interviews and news makers. (S1 E01)

programme.title: On the Ground
programme.desc: In-depth Guardian video journalism from around the world.

programme.title: Buried lives
programme.desc: Roger 'Pigeon' Jarrett and Richard 'Bear' Campbell spent their formative years in one of the most violent and abusive institutions of the Stolen Generations era — Kinchela Aboriginal Boys' Training Home near Kempsey, NSW.

programme.title: Nowt but a fleeting thing
programme.desc: A film about a young farmer's connection to the land, his animals and a changing world in the north of England. Battling against unsustainable farming methods and an unenthusiastic market, Adam Crowe continues to work on two neighbouring farms while fighting to launch his own business and breed a flock of sheep. In rural Britain, the threat of poverty is often frighteningly close

programme.title: After Windrush – Paulette Wilson's visit to Jamaica, 50 years on
programme.desc: A letter from the British government classifying Paulette Wilson as an illegal immigrant shook her sense of identity and belonging. ‘Hostile environment' policies years in the making meant that Wilson and other victims of the Windrush scandal had their right to residency in the UK called into question. She had been detained for a week pending imminent deportation though she had done nothing wrong. It was devastating, but luckily she was released before she was deported.

programme.title: Love Jihad: India's lethal religious conspiracy theory
programme.desc: The mutilated body of a 24-year-old Muslim, Arbaaz Aftab Mullah, was discovered on a railway track near his home. His family believe he was murdered because of his interfaith relationship with a Hindu woman and that he is one of the latest victims of the 'love jihad' conspiracy theory, which has swept across groups of Hindu nationalists in India. The theory claims that Muslim men are seducing Hindu women and luring them into marriage in order to convert them to Islam.

programme.title: With Woman: the high stakes for a home-birth midwife in the US
programme.desc: Star is a Black midwife who helps Black women give birth in the comfort of their homes, in the state of Illinois. She is part of a long-established African-American tradition of home-birth midwifery, which is currently in a legal gray area across a number of US states, with midwives unable to obtain a license to practice. Despite this legal peril, and motivated by the high maternal mortality rate for Black women, Star continues in her role. Here we see Star guide Raven, who is expecting her first child, through her last month of pregnancy, from prenatal visits to the intimate experience of giving birth on her kitchen floor.

programme.title: Space to Be: the fight to keep this Belfast women's centre open
programme.desc: In the heart of the Village, a loyalist area in Belfast, the Windsor Women's Centre has fought a 30-year battle to keep its doors open. The centre, an oasis for vulnerable women, is deeply rooted in the community. As it faces financial insecurity and navigates the pandemic, will these women make it through their toughest year so far?

programme.title: I am Alena | Trans actors
programme.desc: There's nothing here for me': transgender and trapped living a half-life in the deep south | Trans actors: 'Why can't you just represent me as a person?'

programme.title: The Trial
programme.desc: Alka Pradhan, James Connell and Sterling Thomas are lawyers for Ammar al-Baluchi, one of five men facing the death penalty for plotting the 2001 terror attacks in the US. The Trial provides a window into the buildup to the largest criminal trial in American history and reflects on the impact of a rarely seen part of the war on terror: the lack of accountability for the legacy of torture.

programme.title: Trapped in a city of a thousand mountains
programme.desc: A new phenomenon has taken the internet by storm: Chinese rap. But behind its skyrocketing popularity, there is a struggle for freedom of speech. Rappers try to figure out what they can and cannot say after more censorship is announced. In Chongqing, one of China's biggest cities, surveillance is unavoidable. Announcements echo across the vast squares warning that “morally suspect individuals” are banned from speaking in public.

programme.title: Justice for Adama: the family protesting against police brutality in France
programme.desc: Adama Traoré died in police custody last year. His family's struggle for justice has put police brutality back under the spotlight in France, and his older sister Assa is leading the battle to find out the truth about his death. Iman Amrani looks at how this story paved the way for the recent riots in France, following the alleged rape of a young man called Theo by a police officer. *The figure of 15 deaths in custody every year quoted in the film is based on campaign groups and media tallies. No official figures for deaths in custody are recorded in France.

programme.title: My Blonde GF: a disturbing story of deepfake pornography
programme.desc: Helen's world is turned upside down when she discovers that her face has been digitally edited on to images of women in sexually explicit and often violent situations. Helen shares the impact this deepfake pornography has had on her life and challenges a culture that treats women's appearance and image as public property while the perpetrators remain anonymous. Deepfake pornography is an increasingly common form of image-based sexual abuse and in June 2023, an amendment of the online safety bill was announced that criminalises the sharing of deepfake intimate images online.

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: Lives Instead of Knives': one woman's struggle to end knife crime
programme.desc: Smith's Farm Estate in Northolt, north-west London, has been the scene of multiple stabbings. After one murder came particularly close to home, community volunteer Jen Lock began a one-woman mission to end knife crime in the area. But, as she finds out, things don't always go smoothly.

programme.title: The Black Cop: a police officer's story of racism, remorse and resistance
programme.desc: The Black Cop is the winner of the British Short Film category at the 75th British Academy Film Awards. This intimate portrait of Gamal 'G' Turawa, an ex-Metropolitan police officer, explores his memories of racially profiling and harassing black people and homophobia in his early career. Now an openly gay man, Turawa's story is a multi-layered one and sits in the centre of three pivotal moments in recent British history.

programme.title: Stonewall's Ruth Hunt tells Owen Jones: 'My heart breaks for trans communities' | Transgender life in jail and on the street
programme.desc: The Stonewall chief executive, Ruth Hunt, talks to Owen Jones about her shock at the level of vitriol directed at transgender and non-binary people. | More than one-third of transgender inmates in US jails and prisons report sexual assault. When the San Francisco sheriff announced a plan to implement changes for transgender people in the county jail, film-maker Nick Leader went out to meet the inmates who would benefit.

programme.title: How Survivors Ink is erasing the marks of the US sex trafficking industry | The Iraqi girls who escaped from Isis
programme.desc: Pimp-led prostitution is one of the most violent and prolific forms of trafficking found in the US, with hundreds of thousands of women sold annually for commercial gain. Many are branded with tattoos by their traffickers as a sign of ownership and control. After experiencing such an ordeal in Columbus, Ohio, Jennifer Kempton founded Survivors Ink, a grassroots project that helps formerly trafficked women to cover up their branding with their own symbols of hope and recovery. | When Isis militants invaded Sinjar in Iraq they took many young Yazidi women and girls – some as young as nine years old – as sexual slaves and forced them to convert to Islam.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: The senior partner at Ken's firm is retiring and Ken is in the line for succession.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: A nighttime intruder at the Thompsons leaves Ken questioning his manliness.

programme.title: Bosch
programme.desc: The investigation leads to a tragic outcome for a suspect, leaving Bosch and J Edgar reeling. They identify the bones as Arthur Delacroix and track down his family. programme.title: Louis Theroux
programme.desc: BAFTA award-winning documentarian Louis Theroux has delighted audiences and grown a cult following. He discusses how his childhood affected his career and led him to explore the darker aspects of human psychology.

programme.title: Jimmy Carr
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr is one of the biggest names in British comedy, but before his rise to fame, he was in a boring office job. He shares his extraordinary story and actionable lessons in how he turned his life around.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: The Petrozavodsk incident of 1977 was the key moment which determined the official Soviet response to the UFO phenomenon. The sighting of unknown objects in the skies above the Russian city led to the creation of two special boards: scientific and military. In 1987, a military helicopter pursues an unknown object which fits the description of the “TIC-TAC” UFO.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: What do we know about the intentions of UFOs? Answers might be found in an incident that took place in the African city of Ruwa, where an unknown vehicle landed on the property of a school and whose crew members communicated telepathically with the local children.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: During the Cold War Project Blue Book came into being – aimed at gathering and analysing UFO observations. To this day, many cases still raise unanswered questions.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: What's the truth of the organisation known as the MJ-12, an alleged secret committee of elite experts rumoured to have included an American President? Was its establishment related to the mysterious events over Roswell and could it still be active today?

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: Phillip J. Corso claims that the US army possesses at least one crashed extra-terrestrial craft, what secrets are to be found behind the veil of the mysterious Project Aurora?

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common? (S1 E02)

programme.title: Man Vs. Train
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes.

programme.title: The Town Chicken Dinner Built
programme.desc: The Town Chicken Dinner Built

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Our soak in one of the world's largest hot springs comes hard earned from getting down and dirty with ranch work and dinosaur fossils. (S3 E05)

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going all in for some comfort and soul. He makes stops in Charlotte, NC, Las Vegas and Culver City, CA. (S23 E01)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gets a taste of all-American stick-to-your-ribs comfort food in Atlanta and Fort Collins, Colorado. (S23 E04)

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: Chronicles singer-songwriter Steve Azar's endeavor to record his album Down at the Liquor Store at the historic Club Ebony in Indianola, Mississippi with a group of storied musicians.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat's cheese in the heart of Virginia's Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat… (S2 E02)

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: A daredevil cat takes a swan dive, and a first-time dog mom needs a C-section.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: See a neglected animal's happy makeover and a dog's challenging hip replacement.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Meet a scary Rottweiler and an ill spaniel, and hear about a baby on the way.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Follow two naughty chipmunks, an ailing cat, and a dog that needs a nose job.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Help a troubled exotic dog and meet a foster pup who's about to get a new home.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Join Chris on an emergency call for a schnoodle run over by a taxi.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Follow Chris to a bizarre scene to help a dog who's stuck between window bars.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Meet spring's first delivery, a baby animal who tests the rehab team's skills.

programme.title: Royal Britain
programme.sub-title: An Aerial History of the Monarchy
programme.desc: A unique look at the history of the monarchy that will inform and entertain.

programme.title: Leonor: Spain's Next Monarch
programme.desc: Princess Leonor, the eldest daughter of King Felipe VI of Spain, is on the path to become Queen. As she takes on royal duties, she increasingly accompanies Their Majesties at official events. Recently, she was awarded the prestigious Medal of Aragon and the title of Adoptive Daughter of Zaragoza, highlighting her growing influence in Spain. Now in her first year of military training specializing in infantry, Leonor has earned praise from her comrades and superiors for her dedication and leadership potential.

programme.title: German Dynasties
programme.desc: No other dynasty is more closely linked to the fate of Germany than the Hohenzollerns. Princes, kings and emperors emerged from this family. One hundred years ago, in November 1918, their reign came to an end. How do the descendants deal with the legacy of their forefathers? What paths have they taken? The family itself provides the answers. In the film, Georg Friedrich Prince of Prussia and Karl Friedrich Prince of Hohenzollern provide an exclusive personal insight into the family.

programme.title: Windsor Castle: Behind The Walls
programme.desc: Windsor Castle has witnessed royal triumphs and tragedies for over 80 years. In 1936, Elizabeth's future changed with her uncle's abdication, making her father King. During WWII, the castle was a refuge for Elizabeth and Margaret, where she began her royal duties. After a devastating fire in 1992, the royals modernized their image, leading to Windsor's revival by 2016 for the Queen's 90th birthday.

programme.title: Sphinx V
programme.sub-title: Legends of History: Nebukadnezar - I am Incomparable
programme.desc: Travellers have always been fascinated by the ancient weather-beaten stone relief over 2,000 years old in the Lebanese town of Wadi Brisa it shows a life-size figure wearing the crown of a Babylonian king killing a lion. It is a portrait of one of the most famous and at the same time notorious rulers of all time. Even today, over 2,580 years after his death, his name is as well-known as that of Julius Caesar and Alexander the Great: Nebuchadnezzar, the legendary king of Babylon from 604 to 562 BC.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure. Hearing about a fabled treasure of golden sand-dollars, they set out to find it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry's house. But Custard's dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy, Pupcake, who Strawberry takes in during a storm.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Birthday Party
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is feeling down when everyone forgot his birthday.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: Ball Pool
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to play inside the local play area, but he is not allowed to enter.

programme.title: Pizza Bean

programme.title: The Photograph

programme.title: Dancing Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to learn to dance to impress his girlfriend Irma.

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew.

programme.title: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: Mr Bean ends up in a farm slurry pit after racing a tractor.

programme.title: Birthday Bother
programme.desc: It's Irma's birthday. Bean buys a bargain-bin load of cards, and writes out two –one nice, one silly.

programme.title: Bed Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean breaks his bed using it as a trampoline. He tries to fix it, but he can't.

programme.title: Spa Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Bean Encore
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: Mobile Home
programme.desc: Miss Wince takes Mrs. Wicket off on holiday in her brand-new, swanky caravan and Bean is left behind.

programme.title: Haunted House
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to impress some kids in the park with his football skills.

programme.title: Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean accidentally spills all of Mrs. Wicket's new, expensive perfume on the floor.

programme.title: Running On Empty
programme.desc: Mr Bean is on his way to the seaside when the mini runs out of petrol.

programme.title: Bean Bug
programme.desc: Scrapper gives Bean fleas, and Bean is forced to call in the pest control person.

programme.title: Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is out shopping when it starts to rain.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum, at all costs.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers. With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: First Aid blames himself for the theft of Metroplex's transformation cog and quits the Protectobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to bring about a much-needed peace between two alien races.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Professor Sumdac's latest creations begin to think for themselves.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet thinks back on the time that he spent in the Autobot-Decepticon War.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron's attempt to fulfill an ancient Cybertronian prophecy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth has becomed plagued by natural disasters due to Dark Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Facing the greatest threat to Earth to date, the Autobots team with an unexpected ally.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron manipulates the impaired Optimus into joining the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons will do anything to recover an ancient journal that's hidden on Junkion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A crime lord enlists the help of Cobra Commander to entrap the minds of the Autobots in human bodies.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An accident causes the Dinobot Grimlock to become a super genius.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Technobots encounter a conniving smuggler.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tattle-Tail Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Mere Truffle: The Smurfs love truffles but truffles belong to the Trolls and the Trolls live under Truffle Troll Mountain, where in the shadows of the lake lurks the Thing with No Name...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All Hallowseve: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Last Whippoorwill
programme.desc: There are poachers in the Duke of Bedford's forest. They almost succeed in catching the Whippoorwill that lives there... But worse than that, the Duke's son, Chauncey, finds the bird's egg and takes it to the castle for his collection. The Whippoorwill is not doing its insect-eating job anymore, and gnats, mosquitoes, bugs of every type abound. Can the Smurfs restore the Whippoorwill's egg to be nest?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - It's A Puppy's Life: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Puppy Prescription: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs At Sea: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies want to go to sleep, but Tinky Winky finds Po already asleep in his bed. So he goes to look for somewhere else to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Sweet dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's play everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Match
programme.desc: As a Juilliard professor is interviewed by a woman and her husband for her dissertation on the history of dance in 1960s New York City, it becomes increasingly clear that there are ulterior motives to the couple's visit.

programme.title: Middle Of Nowhere
programme.desc: Ruby embarks on a journey of self-discovery when she drops out of medical school to focus on the welfare of her incarcerated husband.

programme.title: The Way You Look Tonight
programme.desc: Ditched after a perfect date, Peter turns to an online dating site guaranteed to find his perfect match, but notices strange similarities between all his matches and that first amazing date.

programme.title: Anarchy
programme.desc: A gritty story of a take-no-prisoners war between dirty cops and an outlaw biker gang. A drug kingpin is driven to desperate measures.

programme.title: The Gift Of Christmas
programme.desc: Christmastime at the home of George and Denise Barnett look festive, but all is not well - George is worried about a friend and Denise over the Christmas concert at their church. Solutions don't come easily but on Christmas Eve everyone is reminded of the true gift of Christmas.

programme.title: Matchmaker Christmas
programme.desc: As the Christmas party for a book publishing company approaches, editor Maggie volunteers to help her boss Amanda find a date. Matchmaking is a bit of a hobby for Maggie, but she is thrown off her game when Jaxson, her boyfriend from her college years, shows up at her work—as a newly signed, successful author. Maggie would love to deny she feels anything for him still, but Jaxson isn't making it easy. She'll have to face her decisions of the past, along with Amanda eyeing Jaxson, to bring together the perfect matches at Christmas.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: Christmas For A Dollar
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, the Kamp family struggles to get by after Mrs. Kamp passes away. The children expect another Christmas without presents until their father brings home one dollar for them to spend on gifts.

programme.title: Blueprint To The Heart
programme.desc: An interior designer trying to save her home renovation show needs to apply her successful, upscale "fixer upper" home renovation strategy to her blue collar carpenter by making the sweet but disheveled guy her next fixer upper project.

programme.title: Baker's Hawk
programme.desc: When a young boy nurses an injured hawk back to health, he gains newfound courage and confidence on his own.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, an army captain tries to tame the open plains of Argentina which are dominated by Indians and bandits. To help do this, the captain brings in a party of women to keep his soldiers happy.

programme.title: Adiós Gringo
programme.desc: A gunslinger on the run for a murder he didn't commit goes to New Mexico where he hopes to find a person who can exculpate him. While on his way he finds a girl who has been kidnapped and tortured, sets her free and then takes his revenge at gunpoint.

programme.title: Hour of Death
programme.desc: Bob Carey, fresh out of jail, goes in search of his fiancée and soon learns that she has married a wealthy farmer.

programme.title: Arizona Colt Returns
programme.desc: Famed gunman Arizona Colt is sent by Moreno to rescue his daughter from the grips of Arizona's old enemy, Keane. But certain complications make the mission far more dangerous than expected.

programme.title: Christmas Together
programme.desc: A woman leaves New York for LA after a break-up and falls in love while renting the guest house of a young father.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol”.

programme.title: The Decoy Bride
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy about an ordinary girl who is hired to be the decoy for the most famous bride in the world.

programme.title: My Best Friends Christmas
programme.desc: When Ashley's plans to reconnect with her high school sweetheart over Christmas fails, she and her best friend Liam decide to fake their own romance. But as her feelings start to turn real, Ashley will have to decide what her heart really wants.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of an international finance deal in New York and Peru, Oliver's Deal is an intense political drama which explores how far people will go to get what they want.

programme.title: Exposed
programme.desc: New York City Detective Galban (Keanu Reeves: John Wick) investigates the brutal murder of his partner. Among the evidence, he finds a photograph of a teacher (Ana de Armas: War Dogs) who he believes may be a vital witness. Co-starring Academy Award Winner Mira Sorvino (Mighty Aphrodite), and Cassian Elwes (Dallas Buyers Club).

programme.title: The Killer Inside Me
programme.desc: Lou, a small town sheriff, has got a bunch of problems including woman trouble and a growing pile of murder victims.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: The Pilgrim
programme.desc: The Tramp is an escaped convict who is mistaken as a pastor in a small town church.

programme.title: Il Bidone
programme.desc: Aging small-time con man Augusto, who swindles peasants, works with two younger men: Roberto, who wants to become the Italian Johnny Ray.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: Charlie is an immigrant who endures a challenging voyage and gets into trouble as soon as he arrives in America.

programme.title: Toll Bar
programme.desc: Rauan works at a parking lot in a prestigious residential area. Aidar passes him daily in his luxurious car. The auto belongs to his father, who works in the oil business. Rauan and Aidar are both determined to build their own lives themselves. They live in the same city, their paths cross in the same yard, but there is an abyss between them. They are separated by a toll-bar between wealth and poverty. One day Aidar and Rauan will clash and their worlds will clash. What will the results be..?

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another.

programme.title: Banjo Farid
programme.desc: Farid, 12 years old, is an enigma to others. Quiet and original, he seems to be experiencing daily life without feeling any emotion. However, one day, against all expectations, he will change thanks to an improbable musical instrument.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: Two highly skilled martial arts warriors must train an American teen so that he is able to fight a centuries old battle to free the Monkey King.

programme.title: Harry Brown: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: The young hero leads his warriors against an evil baron and tries to destroy a galaxy-wide trade in 'spice', a mind-altering drug. Dune is an unbelievable world beyond time and space, the ultimate adventure that goes beyond the imagination.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of army medic and conscientious objector Desmond Doss who, during WWII, saved 75 men without firing or carrying a gun.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Infini
programme.desc: Humanity has become the victim of mass overpopulation and the line between middle class and poverty no longer exists. Whit Carmichael has accepted a high-risk security job that requires off-world travel using Slipstream technology in the hope of rising out of his situation. The risk of injury or death is extreme but the danger is sweetened by Whit's dream of a better life for his family.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a pharmaceutical company called Dynamic Health Cure to be implanted with the LEXX nanochip. Sarah hopes that the money received for her participation will solve her financial troubles and help her to take care of her mother who has Alzheimer's. A nanochip is implanted in her cerebral cortex. It is designed with artificial intelligence technology to take control of the body at the inception of any disease or illness. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah is plunged into a murderous spiral with only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: Meander
programme.desc: After getting a car ride from an unknown man, Lisa wakes up in a tube. On her arm is strapped a bracelet with a countdown. She quickly understands that every 8 minutes, fire burns an occupied section. She has no choice but to crawl into safe sections to survive. To know why she's there and how to get out, Lisa will have to face the memories of her dead daughter...

programme.title: Against the Wild: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog must use all their skills to survive in the African bush after a plane crash.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, to take her to the senior prom, little did she know that 15 years later she'd be married, have two daughters and tons of debt. When Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker, Paula wishes her decision were different. With bills and troubles mounting, especially frustrating during the Christmas season, Paula wishes hard to trade places with Nick's wife. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick. But, be careful what you wish for… Although she is financially rich, she is far from happy. Eventually her “dream” becomes a “nightmare,” as Nick wants a divorce and she can't find a way back to Gary and her daughters. Will there be a Merry Christmas?

programme.title: The Past Never Dies
programme.desc: CASEY MARSH was born in captivity. Her mother, JANE, was abducted as a teenager and gave birth to Casey while she was being held by the kidnapper, TIMOTHY FAST. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that her mother has hidden this knowledge from her all this time. Then, Jane suddenly disappears. Has she been kidnapped again? Casey must face the demons of her past in order to find her mother before it's too late.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: London Heist
programme.desc: Your enemies are closer than you think.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: A shady businessman and his associate flee to the Cayman Islands, setting off a chain reaction.

programme.title: Belly
programme.desc: Two Gangsters have an awakening.

programme.title: Belly 2: Millionaire Boyz Club
programme.desc: The underworld rises up with this new film starring rapper The Game.

programme.title: The Three Dogateers Save Christmas
programme.desc: When a couple of burglars make off with their family's presents and decorations, the Three Dogateers set off on a journey to sniff out the bad guys and save Christmas!

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: Feather Christmas
programme.desc: For single dad, and veterinarian, Martin, Christmas is all about upholding regular family traditions to keep the memory of his late wife alive. But when an ailing pet chicken arrives at his home-run animal sanctuary, the family's festive plans, and entire world, are turned upside down, as new love blossoms and spreads its wings!

programme.title: THE CHRISTMAS PACT
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question two neighbors will answer.

programme.title: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Connie and Will, like their families before them, have been business rivals.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: True story inspiration: Wesley's gift impacts Megan's life.

programme.title: THE CHRISTMAS PACT
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question two neighbors will answer.

programme.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
programme.desc: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon is a “jaws”-dropping action thriller from the director of Kickboxer starring John Barrowman and Jenny McShane. When two researchers discover a colossal shark's tooth off the Mexican coast their worst fears surface - the most menacing beast to ever rule the waters is still alive and mercilessly feeding on anything that crosses its path.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge. Starring Martin Kemp (The Krays), Gary Kemp (The World's End), and from the producers of Rise of the Footsoldier and Goodfellas, Assassin is the story of the most corrupt crime bosses in the London underworld, and one man's crusade to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: One man, one grudge and a target on his back. Disgraced U.S Secret Agent Nicolas Shaw is pulled out of hiding one last time into a world of death and espionage. With his skills put to the test and a small window of time to save a former colleague, Nicolas resorts to desperate measures to complete one last mission. Barry Pepper (The Green Mile) takes the lead in this masterclass of action-suspense.

programme.title: Dark Crimes
programme.desc: From the executive producers of The Revenant, Jim Carrey commands the screen in this spellbinding thriller. When a disgraced detective Tadek notices the stark similarities between a murder case and a crime novel written by Kozlow (Marton Csokas), he sees an opportunity to redeem his career. Digging deeper Tadek is soon caught up in a game of cat and mouse, that will reveal a dark truth! Gripping!

programme.title: Candy Corn
programme.desc: A traveling carnival is in town for the weekend and local outcast, Jacob Atkins, has been hired as one of the freaks in the events main attraction. Meanwhile, a group of local bullies are planning their annual public hazing of Jacob, but this year things go too far

programme.title: Christmas In Homestead
programme.desc: A famous Hollywood star travels to the small-town of Homestead to film her new movie. But will meeting the town's handsome mayor lead to love and the discovery of the true meaning of Christmas? (2016)

programme.title: Finding Father Christmas
programme.desc: A woman who was orphaned at a young age discovers a clue that leads her back to her father. Can she reunite her family in time for Christmas? Stars Erin Krakow, Niall Matter (2016)

programme.title: Welcome To Christmas
programme.desc: Madison Lane is a property developer searching for the perfect location for a new ski resort. Will she ultimately fall for the charms of a small Colorado town and its handsome, widowed sheriff? (2018)

programme.title: A Song For Christmas
programme.desc: A pop star fleeing the demands of her chaotic life stays with a local family. Will a traditional family Christmas and the prospect of love allow her to appreciate the important things in life? (2017)

programme.title: Very British Christmas
programme.desc: An opera singer finds herself stranded in Yorkshire with her only place to stay being a bed-and-breakfast run by a handsome widower. Starring Rachel Shenton (2019)

programme.title: A Winter Princess
programme.desc: Princess Carly, working incognito at a ski resort, must team up with the owner's brother, Jesse, to plan the resort's 50th anniversary celebration.

programme.title: My One and Only
programme.desc: Stephanie enters a TV reality show to discover "the one". Stephanie discovers her inner strength to go for the things she wants, not what others think she should have. (2019)

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: Diane is a struggling single mom in LA. Just when things are at there worst, she inherits a house, but she will have to live in small town USA and take care of a dog.

programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: BOYS IN BLUE, THE
programme.desc: Comedy starring Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball as two village policemen.

programme.title: ASK A POLICEMAN
programme.desc: When the Chief Constable suggests that a sleepy village does not need a police force, the resident officers try to create an artificial crime wave. Then they discover a gang of smugglers. An irreverent send up of the British bobby starring Will Hay.

programme.title: ALF'S BUTTON AFLOAT
programme.desc: Six brothers find themselves accidentally enrolled in the Marine Corps. One of them discovers a genie ready to fulfil their dreams. The fun starts when the genie obtains the entire contents of the Bank of England, which does not go unnoticed!

programme.title: PASSIONATE SUMMER
programme.desc: An idealistic young schoolmaster arrives at a Jamaican boarding school.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Nine Bullets
programme.desc: Gypsy Moon (Lena Headey – Games of Thrones) is a novelist by day and when night falls, she dances to earn her keep.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Directed by Oscar-winning actor Robert De Niro and adapted from Chazz Palminteri's successful one-man play, 'A Bronx Tale' is a character-driven crime drama. Growing up in the Bronx in the 1960s, an adolescent is torn between his working-class father and a violent yet charismatic crime boss.

programme.title: The Ghost
programme.desc: Britain's former PM is holed up in a remote, ocean-front house in America, struggling to finish his memoirs, when his long-term assistant drowns. A professional ghostwriter is sent to rescue the project.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 2: Hero Of The Federation
programme.desc: A small group of troopers find themselves taking refuge in an abandoned outpost as they attempt to fight the encroaching arachnids - not realizing that a much graver danger is actually infiltrating their unit.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 3: Marauder
programme.desc: Johnny Rico is now a general, and called back into action to defeat the bugs.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: STRIPES is a hilarious film with Bill Murray as an irresponsible goof-off who has just lost his job, his girl, his apartment and his car. As he ponders his fate, it occurs to him that enlisting in the Army seems to be a sensible career move. He persuades his friend to join him and soon they find themselves in boot camp surrounded by misfits.

programme.title: The Freshman (1990)
programme.desc: New York University film student Broderick falls in love with loony mob family headed by Brando in this infectious comedy, with an amusing screenplay by Andrew Bergman. This cast includes Marlon Brando, Matthew Broderick, Maximilian Schell, Bruno Kirby, Penelope Ann Miller, Frank Whaley and Paul Benedict.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: In Neil Simon's SEEMS LIKE OLD TIMES, Chevy Chase is forced to abet some bank robbers, and soon the cops are after him. His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: Previously featured at the London Film Festival. A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events leads him to decide if there is meaning to life after the death of his partner,Jim.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Hilary Swank† and Meryl Streep‡ star in this action epic set in America's West in the 1850's. Mary Bee Cuddy is an independent frontier woman, living a life of solitude. When three women are declared insane by the local preacher.

programme.title: Eden
programme.desc: Spanning two decades across Paris, New York and Chicago, Eden is an epic story of euphoria, melancholy and passion.

programme.title: The Mother
programme.desc: When May's husband dies on a family visit to London, she recedes into the background of her busy children's lives. Until, that is, she falls for Darren, a man half her age who is renovating her son's house and sleeping with her daughter.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: White Vengeance tells the story of two brothers contending for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty, which ruled Imperial China from 221 to 206 BC. As rebels rose, the nation fell into chaos.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: Francis 'Pope' Silva is a popular, soon to be retiring casino owner and feared mafia boss. When one of his employees Luke Vaughn desperately needs cash for his daughter's much needed operation...

programme.title: The Minute You Wake Up Dead
programme.desc: AS THE BODIES PILE UP, HIS WORLD WILL FALL APART. An investment banker in small town America finds one mistake could cost him his life as his clients lose vast amounts of money. As the threats begin to pile in, one call asks “Where will you be the minute you wake up dead?”.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: In an age of honour and justice by the sword, Raiden is a fallen warrior who must rise up against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge Bartok, his dishonoured master.

It is in the seven seas that we find the last "white spaces" of our world: unexplored, mysterious expanses still virtually off-limits to human beings – although that doesn't stop us recklessly plundering and destroying these areas.

programme.title: Dolphins and Whales
programme.desc: Ute Margreff lives on the rough Atlantic coast of Ireland, while Florian Graner has settled in the fjord region in the north-west of the USA. Both originally from Germany, they have never met, but they are united by one thing: a passion for the sea and its inhabitants.

programme.title: The Giant and the Phantom
programme.desc: Sperm whales in the Mediterranean? Is the most popular holiday spot for Germans really home to the biggest predator on our planet? It is common knowledge that sperm whales like to hunt in the shallow waters of the ocean, but wildlife film-maker Thomas Behrend gets plenty of sceptical looks when he sets off for Greece with his camera in order to film sperm whales.
